Restart of MetaD, Protein Only

Current report for Protein only, after restart because of over-written files.

Brady Johnston

Report Auto-generated: 15 July, 2020

This report has been auto-generated. If all goes well, the latest COLVAR_METAD and HILLS files should be downloaded from Topaz and then the numbers crunched.

The working files were last edited at 2020-07-15 18:53:29.

There is a .pdf and .html version of this report. They are the same, but the .html version will contain an animated Z v S graph.

Report Results

Read in COLVAR file

run <- "./"
metadata <- "Protein Only, Restarted Run"
fl <- list.files(run, pattern = "COLVAR", recursive = T, full.names = T)
df <- read.table(fl)
colnames(df) <- c("time", "path.sss", "path.zzz", "metad.rbias", "walls.bias", "rmsd0", "rmsd1")
head(df)
##   time path.sss  path.zzz metad.rbias walls.bias    rmsd0    rmsd1
## 1    0 1.270380 -0.026215    0.000000          0 2.126417 0.048416
## 2    1 1.284371 -0.024643    0.000000          0 2.126084 0.074869
## 3    2 1.289124 -0.023650    0.999783          0 2.132569 0.084888
## 4    3 1.291401 -0.023062    1.970569          0 2.139557 0.090347
## 5    4 1.296943 -0.022330    2.913009          0 2.145231 0.098094
## 6    5 1.301885 -0.021643    3.828633          0 2.152511 0.104938

Initial Z vs S plot.

zvs <- df %>% 
  filter() %>%
ggplot(aes(path.sss, path.zzz, colour = round(time / 1e3, 2))) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.3) + 
  scale_colour_viridis_c() + 
  simple_light() + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10, limits = c(1,10)) +
  labs(title = "Z vs S: MetaD, lambda = 10", colour = "Time (ns)", 
       subtitle = metadata) #+ 
  #ggsave(paste(run,"z_vs_s.pdf", sep = "_"), width = 5, height = 3)
zvs

Animated Z vs S plot

Will only appear in the .html version of the report

I can’t seem to get rid of the rendering messages, oh well for now.

Plotting relative density.

ggplot(df, aes(path.sss, path.zzz)) + 
  geom_density_2d_filled(contour_var = "ndensity" ) + 
  # scale_fill_brewer() +
  simple_light() + 
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(1,10), breaks = 1:10, expand = c(0,0)) + 
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,2.5), expand = c(0,0)) + 
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank()) + 
  labs(title = "Z vs S Density", 
       subtitle = metadata, 
       fill = "Relative Density")
## Warning: Removed 3069 rows containing non-finite values (stat_density2d_filled).

Reading in Heights

df2 <- read.table(list.files(path = run, pattern = "HILLS", recursive = T, full = T))

colnames(df2) <- c("time", "path.sss", "path.zzz", "sigma_path.sss", "sigma_path.zzz", "height", "biasf")
head(df2)
##   time path.sss    path.zzz sigma_path.sss sigma_path.zzz    height biasf
## 1    1 1.284371 -0.02464338            0.3           0.08 1.0714286    15
## 2    2 1.289124 -0.02364988            0.3           0.08 1.0404765    15
## 3    3 1.291401 -0.02306198            0.3           0.08 1.0112781    15
## 4    4 1.296943 -0.02233016            0.3           0.08 0.9837163    15
## 5    5 1.301885 -0.02164331            0.3           0.08 0.9576583    15
## 6    6 1.307948 -0.02092253            0.3           0.08 0.9330223    15

Plotting height over time.

ggplot(df2, aes(time/1e3, height)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  scale_y_continuous() + 
  simple_light() + 
  labs(x = "Time (ns)", 
       title = "Height over Time", 
       subtitle = metadata) + 
  ggsave(paste(run,"height.pdf", sep = "_"), width = 5, height = 3)

Plotting RMSD

df %>% 
  select(time, rmsd0, rmsd1) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(rmsd0, rmsd1)) %>% 
 
ggplot(aes(time/1e3, y = value, colour = name)) + #, colour = time, group = name)) +
  # scale_colour_viridis_c() +
  # facet_wrap(~name, ncol = 1) + 
  # theme(aspect.ratio = 1/5) +
  geom_line() +
  simple_light() + 
  scale_x_continuous() +
  labs(title = "RMSD over Time", 
       subtitle = metadata,
       x = "Time (ns)", 
       y = "RMSD", 
       colour = "Model") + 
  ggsave(paste(run,"RMSD.pdf", sep = "_"), width = 5, height = 3)

Plotting Rbias

ggplot(df, aes(time/1e3, metad.rbias)) + 
  # geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.3) + 
  geom_line() +
  scale_colour_viridis_c() + 
  scale_y_continuous() +
  simple_light() + 
  labs(title = "rbias: MetaD, lambda = 10", 
       subtitle = metadata,
       colour = "Time (ns)", 
       x = "Time (ns)")# + 

  ggsave(paste(run,"rbias.pdf", sep = "_"), width = 5, height = 3)
